consistency_check.source_type_rarity_vs_type_rarity: Consistent ('Wondrous item' vs 'Wondrous item', 'very rare' vs 'Very Rare')

quality_assessment.completeness: High. Contains standard descriptive fields (slug, name, type, rarity, description, source).
quality_assessment.clarity: High. The mechanical effect and time investment are clearly stated.
quality_assessment.formatting_notes: Rarity uses mixed casing ('Very Rare' vs 'very rare' in source_type_rarity).

effect.description: Increase Wisdom score by 2, including maximum.
effect.prerequisites: Spend 48 hours over 6 days or fewer studying and practicing.
effect.recharge_or_duration: Consumes the magic; regains in 1 century.

mechanics_assessment.balance_note: Standard effect for a Very Rare manual, though the century recharge period is noteworthy for long-term campaign planning.
